creator: andriys@gmail.com
text:
'pkg update' seems to add 'repo.txz' to the packagesite twice, thus trying to download non-existing file from the repo.

How-To-Repeat: Install and configure pkgng 1.0-beta14, then run:

pkg update

You'll get something like this:

Updating remote repository
pkg: http://192.168.1.2/pkgng/repo.txz/repo.txz: Not Found
